commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional enabled gate to provider toggle descriptors, uses it to disable and dim Claude's Avoid Keychain prompts setting when global Keychain access is disabled, and adds focused descriptor coverage plus a changelog note.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main guards writes to the Claude prompt-free binding while global Keychain access is disabled, but the shared toggle row still renders without an enabled gate or disabled styling. I did not run the app or tests because this review is read-only.
